title: psiadia ceylanica var. ceylanica
intro: Psiadia ceylanica var. ceylanica, also known as Sri Lankan Psiadia, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other compounds. The health benefits of Psiadia ceylanica var. ceylanica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant activity, which may help to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In terms of herbal preparations, Psiadia ceylanica var. ceylanica is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are administered orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
